title: CSS Backgrounds
content:
### CSS Backgrounds

Background properties add colors, images, and effects behind elements.

---

### Background Properties

| Property | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `background-color` | Solid background color |
| `background-image` | Background image(s) |
| `background-repeat` | How image repeats |
| `background-position` | Image position |
| `background-size` | Image size |
| `background-attachment` | Scroll behavior |
| `background-clip` | Area the background covers |
| `background-origin` | Positioning area |
| `background` | Shorthand for all |

---

### Background Color

```css
div {
  background-color: lightblue;
}
```

---

### Background Image

```css
div {
  background-image: url("image.jpg");
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: center;
  background-size: cover;
}
```

---

### Background Repeat

```css
background-repeat: repeat;      /* Default - tiles */
background-repeat: no-repeat;   /* No tiling */
background-repeat: repeat-x;    /* Horizontal only */
background-repeat: repeat-y;    /* Vertical only */
```

---

### Background Size

```css
background-size: cover;      /* Covers entire area (crops) */
background-size: contain;    /* Fits inside area (no crop) */
background-size: 200px 100px; /* Exact dimensions */
background-size: 50%;       /* Percentage of element */
```

---

### Background Shorthand

```css
div {
  background: #333 url("img.jpg") no-repeat center/cover;
}

/* Order: color image repeat position/size */
```

---

### Multiple Backgrounds

```css
div {
  background: 
    url("overlay.png") no-repeat center,
    url("pattern.jpg") repeat,
    linear-gradient(to bottom, #000, #fff);
}
```

> **Best Practice:** Always set `background-color` as fallback when using background images.
